2603.18329.title: FaithSteer-BENCH: A Deployment-Aligned Stress-Testing Benchmark for Inference-Time Steering
2603.18329.paper_summary: Inference-time steering is widely regarded as a lightweight and parameter-free mechanism for controlling large language model (LLM) behavior, and prior work has often suggested that simple activation-level interventions can reliably induce targeted behavioral changes. However, such conclusions are typically drawn under relatively relaxed evaluation settings that overlook deployment constraints, capability trade-offs, and real-world robustness. We therefore introduce \textbf{FaithSteer-BENCH}, a stress-testing benchmark that evaluates steering methods at a fixed deployment-style operating point through three gate-wise criteria: controllability, utility preservation, and robustness. Across multiple models and representative steering approaches, we uncover several systematic failure modes that are largely obscured under standard evaluation, including illusory controllability, measurable cognitive tax on unrelated capabilities, and substantial brittleness under mild instruction-level perturbations, role prompts, encoding transformations, and data scarcity. Gate-wise benchmark results show that existing methods do not necessarily provide reliable controllability in deployment-oriented practical settings. In addition, mechanism-level diagnostics indicate that many steering methods induce prompt-conditional alignment rather than stable latent directional shifts, further explaining their fragility under stress. FaithSteer-BENCH therefore provides a unified benchmark and a clearer analytical lens for future method design, reliability evaluation, and deployment-oriented research in steering.
2603.18329.paper_summary_zh: 推理時間的引導被廣泛認為是一種輕量且無參數的機制，用於控制大型語言模型（LLM）的行為，先前的研究經常建議，簡單的激活水平干預可以可靠地引發目標行為的變化。<lb/>然而，這些結論通常是在相對放鬆的評估環境下得出的，忽略了部署限制、能力權衡和現實世界的穩健性。<lb/>因此，我們介紹了\textbf{FaithSteer-BENCH}，這是一個壓力測試基準，通過三個門控標準來評估引導方法在固定的部署風格操作點上的表現：可控性、效用保留和穩健性。<lb/>在多個模型和代表性的引導方法中，我們發現了幾種系統性失效模式，這些模式在標準評估下大多被掩蓋，包括虛幻的可控性、對無關能力的可測認知負擔，以及在輕微的指令級擾動、角色提示、編碼轉換和數據稀缺下的顯著脆弱性。<lb/>門控基準結果顯示，現有方法在以部署為導向的實際環境中不一定提供可靠的可控性。<lb/>此外，機制層級的診斷表明，許多引導方法引發的是基於提示的條件對齊，而非穩定的潛在方向性變化，進一步解釋了它們在壓力下的脆弱性。<lb/>因此，FaithSteer-BENCH提供了一個統一的基準和更清晰的分析視角，供未來的方法設計、可靠性評估和以部署為導向的引導研究使用。
2603.18329.author: Zikang Ding et.al.
2603.18329.authors: Zikang Ding, Qiying Hu, Yi Zhang, Hongji Li, Junchi Yao, Hongbo Liu, Lijie Hu
